title: Liability for entry or work done
doc_html:
§62.  Liability for entry or work done

The person making use of the authority conferred in R.S. 50:61 is liable for any damage caused by the entry on the land or by the work done.
doc_text:
§62.  Liability for entry or work done
The person making use of the authority conferred in R.S. 50:61 is liable for any damage caused by the entry on the land or by the work done.
